description: Sector overlay for electricity, natural gas, energy utilities, generation, transmission, distribution, sale, tariff, safety, and energy-sector documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Energy and Power. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 (Act 1038)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Cyber Security Authority

rules.title: Energy Commission licence or authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Energy Commission licence, electricity or natural gas authorization, generation, transmission, distribution, wholesale supply, or sale licence evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: PURC tariff, consumer-service, or utility-service evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for PURC tariff approval, utility consumer service, service quality, complaint, or billing evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Energy safety, technical standard, or operational control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for safety, technical standards, maintenance, operational controls, metering, or emergency procedures.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Critical energy infrastructure cybersecurity or continuity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for cyber-risk, continuity, access control, incident, or critical infrastructure evidence in energy operations.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
